mapper.select: select member_info.member_id AS memberId, member_info.name AS name, member_info.login_id AS loginId, member_info.email AS email, member_info.nickname AS nickname, member_info.member_type AS memberType, member_info.profile_img_url AS profileImgUrl, member_info.signup_type AS signupType, member_info.member_status AS memberStatus, member_info.member_role AS memberRole, member_info.email_verified AS emailVerified, member_info.last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, member_info.deleted_at AS deletedAt from member_social_auth social_auth inner join member member_info on member_info.member_id = social_auth.member_id where social_auth.provider = #{provider} and social_auth.provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: insert into member( name, login_id, email, nickname, member_type, profile_img_url, signup_type, member_status, member_role, email_verified, email_verified_at, last_login_at ) values( #{name}, #{loginId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{memberType}, #{profileImgUrl}, #{signupType}, #{memberStatus}, #{memberRole}, #{emailVerified}, #{emailVerifiedAt}, now() )
mapper.update: update member set last_login_at = now() where member_id = #{memberId} and member_status = 'ACTIVE' and deleted_at is null
